name: ShoulderUp Technology Acquisition Corp.
description: ShoulderUp Technology Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, also known as a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Led by industry veterans, the company focuses on identifying and acquiring businesses within the technology and cybersecurity sectors. It was established to provide a platform for growth and strategic development, leveraging the leadership and expertise of its management team to create long-term value for shareholders through a successful business combination.
